titleStmt.title: SII 9.485: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 485. (A.R. No. 742 of 1916.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE NARASIMHASVAMI TEMPLE AT UPPADIHALLI, MADAKASIRA TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1434, Āṅgira, Vaiśākha, śu. 15, corresponding to A.D. 1512 April 30 Friday (not verifiable), in the reign of Kṛishṇadēvarāya-Mahārāya. It records that Ellaya, a servant of the king made a gift of the village Upuḍihaḷḷi, situated in Rodda-nāḍu, a district of Māraṭūr-sīme, for the service of the god Ahōbala-Nārasiṁha at Hiriya-Dhāḷivaṭa. The gift was made for the merit of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīvijayā
dbhudeyaśālivāhanaśakāda 1434
neya mēle saluva Āṁgirasaṁvatsara
da vayiśākha śu 15 lu śrīma(ṁ)nma
hārājādhirāja paramēsvara śrīkru
ṣṇadēvarāyamahārāyara Ū
ḷigada Ellayanu hiriya dhāḷivaṭa
da Ahōbalanārasiṁhadēvarige sāṣṭāṁ
gaveṟagi koṭa dharmmasāsana naṁma nāya
katanake saluva māraṭūra sīmeya ro
ddanāḍoḷagaṇa Upuḍihaḷiyanū
śrīvīrakruṣṇadēvarāyamahārāya
rige dharmmavāgi Ahōbaladēvarige da
dhyaṁna dīpārādhane śrīkāryyaṁgaḷige
paurṇami pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalū dhā
rāgrahītavāgi sadyaparichēdavāgi
koṭevāgi �yo grāmake saluva keṟe gade
bitta guyalu kāḍāraṁbha sakala svarṇa
dāya sakala dhānyādāya Ēnuṁṭā
da Aṣṭabhōga sarvasvāmyaṁgaḷanu
Āgumāḍikoṁbudu śrī
�yo dharmmake Āvanoba A
ḷupidava taṁma mātrā
piturugaḷanū gōbrā
hāmmaṇaranū vāraṇāsi
tīradalū koraḷa kuyida
pāppake hōhanu .
Avana vaṁśavellā nirvaṁ
śa Ahudu śrī Ahō
balēsvaranē balla śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.485 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
